steps.title: Identify the function
steps.content: The underlined portion describes Kessler and colleagues as capitalizing on a vast but relatively underutilized source of insight. That language evaluates the importance of using historical DNA rather than giving details about study results or future uses. It is a judgment about methodological value.

steps.title: Reject other functions
steps.content: Choice A says the phrase specifies applications, but it does not name any. Choice B shifts to the findings about pathogen DNA. Choice D says the phrase explains why the method is not widely used, but no cause is given. The answer is C.
